  • Additional Notes: 📌 VR Graphics & Performance – Important Note This game is designed as a scalable PC VR experience. Visual quality and performance depend on two combined factors: • Your VR streaming settings (Virtual Desktop, Air Link, SteamVR resolution) • The in-game graphics preset (Low / Medium / High) The in-game presets adjust visual quality within the current streaming resolution. This means that higher streaming quality with Medium in-game settings may look better than lower streaming quality with High settings. This behavior is normal for PC VR and allows the game to run smoothly across a wide range of hardware configurations. For the best experience, we recommend balancing both streaming quality and in-game settings according to your PC and network performance.

  • Additional Notes: The framerate may drop during graphic-intensive scenes. - Additional storage is required for each subsequent update. - Additional Hardware: A physical bow (AccuBow VR hardware) is required to play this game, with the left VR controller attached to it for tracking. The left controller vibrates upon releasing the bowstring to register the shot. You can purchase this physical bow (AccuBow VR hardware) from AccuBow Store
